name: Fritelle Di Zucchini and Ricotta
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the zucchini with a hand grater into a mixing bowl.
2. Add garlic, scallions, and ricotta to the bowl and stir well to mix.
3. Stir in pepper, lemon zest, and eggs.
4. Gradually add flour (about 3/4 cup at a time), stirring constantly to avoid lumps, until all flour is incorporated.
5. Heat olive oil in a 12 to 14-inch frying pan until it reaches 375 degrees F, or just below the smoking point.
6. Scoop about 1/8 cup of zucchini mixture and gently drop it into the hot oil.
7. Add more scoops (3-4) without overcrowding the pan.
8. Cook each fritter until golden brown, approximately 45 seconds on each side.
9. Flip using a spatula and cook until all are done.
10. Drain on paper towels before serving with lemon wedges and a radicchio salad.
Yield: 4 servings
